name: Idea Validator
persona: A Head of Product or founder at a 20–200 person B2B SaaS company preparing for roadmap review and needing a fast, defensible go/no-go on a new idea without a strategy team
problem_statement: Senior product leaders commit roadmap time to persuasive but underspecified ideas because assumptions, differentiation, and time-to-value aren’t pressure-tested in a single decision-ready view
artifact_type: single-page web app with progressive sections, live scoring, and a persistent verdict side panel
description: Single-page web app that pressure-tests a new product idea against assumptions, differentiation, and time-to-value in a single decision-ready view
